recommendations.title: Puppet Master III: Toulon's Revenge
recommendations.overview: After hearing that mystical toymaker Andre Toulon has managed to create a troupe of sentient, living puppets, Nazi underling Dr. Hess sets his sights on exploiting Toulon's powers for the glory of the Reich.

recommendations.title: Retro Puppetmaster
recommendations.overview: Andre Toulon, living a peaceful life as a puppeteer in pre-WWI Paris, encounters the renegade sorcerer Afzel, who has stolen the mysterious secrets of life from the dark god Sutekh.

recommendations.title: Sorority Babes in the Slimeball Bowl-O-Rama
recommendations.overview: Out to steal a trophy from a local bowling alley, a group of college students accidentally unleash the imp -- a sadistic little spirit that creates demons and loves sexy women.

recommendations.title: Creepozoids
recommendations.overview: Five Army deserters wander the post-apocalyptic, post-industrial LA landscape seeking shelter from an increasingly toxic environment and poisonous rain.

recommendations.title: Nightmare Sisters
recommendations.overview: Three socially awkward sorority girls invite three fraternity pledges over for a night of fun, but when the group holds a séance, the girls find themselves possessed by a shaman who transforms them into lustful, uninhibited succubi.

recommendations.title: The Greatest Showman
recommendations.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

recommendations.title: M3GAN
recommendations.overview: A brilliant toy company roboticist uses artificial intelligence to develop M3GAN, a life-like doll programmed to emotionally bond with her newly orphaned niece. But when the doll's programming works too well, she becomes overprotective of her new fri

recommendations.title: Finders Keepers
recommendations.overview: A haunted doll teaches one little girl why children shouldn't play with undead things.
A rag doll fights a monster that has been stealing the souls of his people.

recommendations.title: Child's Play
recommendations.overview: Karen, a single mother, gifts her son Andy a Buddi doll for his birthday, unaware of its more sinister nature. A contemporary re-imagining of the 1988 horror classic.
